# Estate Agent Newsletters

> Estate Agent Newsletters is a done-for-you, weekly local email newsletter service for UK estate agents. It builds trust with local homeowners months before they are ready to move, so the agency wins more instructions from sellers and landlords. Each newsletter is exclusive to one agency per postcode area.

## What it is

Every Thursday morning we send the agency's professionally written newsletter, under their own brand, to their local audience. Each edition contains:

- Good local news and what's on: positive stories from the area, new openings, and what's happening that weekend.
- The property market update: up-to-the-minute local market data, explained in plain, jargon-free English.
- The agency's Property of the Week, fetched automatically from the agency's own website.

## Why it works

Sellers and landlords do not choose an estate agent at random. They go with the name they already know, recognise and trust as the local expert. Agents who only make contact when someone is ready to move right now compete with every other agent for a small, highly competitive slice of the market. A weekly newsletter reaches everyone else and builds the relationship early, so when the time comes to sell or let there is only one agent they call.

## How it works

- Completely hands-off. The agency tells us about their agency and their target patches, and they are live within 48 hours.
- We handle the writing, the formatting and the sending.
- Zero-tech setup. We do everything, including the logo, the brand colours, and fetching the Property of the Week from the agency's site.
- The agency owns the audience.

## Building the audience

- We grow the subscriber list every month from scratch, so an agency does not need an existing database.
- £100 of the monthly fee is reinvested directly into social ads targeting homeowners in the agency's specific postcodes.
- Agencies with an existing database of past clients and valuation leads can have those contacts uploaded safely and invited to subscribe.

## Pricing and terms

- £349 per month, all inclusive, no hidden fees.
- Includes £100 per month of direct local ad spend.
- Strict outcode (postcode) exclusivity: for as long as an agency is subscribed, no other agent in their area can buy the service, use the content, or access the local ad targeting. When an agency leaves, the area becomes available again.
- No long-term contracts. We ask for three months to build traction, then it is rolling monthly.
- 60-day guarantee: if we do not get the agency 100 subscribers within 60 days, they get every penny back, including the ad spend.

## Get started

- Free sample: an agent can enter their postcode to check whether their area is still available and claim a free sample newsletter.
- Contact: hello@estateagentnewsletters.co.uk

## Links

- [Home](https://estateagentnewsletters.co.uk/): Landing page explaining the offering, pricing and guarantee.
